questionHtml:
The diagram shows the molecular structure of the amino acid leucine.

Explain how enzymes are used in the preparation of milk suitable for individuals who are lactose intolerant.
markschemeHtml:
1. the enzyme lactase acts on lactose;
  2. the enzymes are immobilised / are bound to alginate beads;
  3. (pouring milk over the immobilised enzymes) causes lactose to be hydrolysed/broken down into monosaccharides/glucose and galactose;

Some product must be stated in mpc.

meta.title: Explain how enzymes are used in the preparation of milk suitable for individuals who are lactose intolerant.
